message:
test(fcp-core): add connector state golden vector tests (flywheel_connectors-70pq)

Comprehensive test coverage for ConnectorState module:
- CBOR golden vectors for deterministic serialization
- State chain integrity and hash verification
- Singleton-writer fencing validation
- Failover sequence testing
- Fork detection and resolution (CRITICAL safety)
- Snapshot configuration and compaction
- CRDT delta semantics
- Adversarial scenario handling
- Edge cases (empty chains, max sequences)

75 tests total covering all state models.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
